Summit Roof Pros provides expert roofing services backed by 12+ years of experience. Quality craftsmanship, reliable service, and complete customer satisfaction on every project.

Quality Roofing Backed by Experience and Trust

For over 12 years, Summit Roof Pros has been the go-to roofing contractor for homeowners and businesses in Denver. We combine expert craftsmanship with premium materials to deliver roofing solutions that stand the test of time. Our dedicated team takes pride in every project, ensuring your complete satisfaction from the first inspection to the final cleanup.

Our Roofing Services

Professional roofing solutions tailored to protect your home and enhance its value.

Roof Replacement

Complete roof systems designed for Denver's punishing weather patterns.

Durable roofing solutions for Denver-area businesses and multi-family properties.

Learn More →

Gutter Installation

Heavy-duty gutter systems that handle Colorado's intense downpours and snowmelt.

Learn More →

Roof Inspection

Comprehensive evaluations that uncover hidden damage before it becomes costly.

Learn More →

Shingle Repair

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our roofing services.

How do I know if I need a full replacement versus repairs?

We recommend replacement when we find multiple failing components, widespread damage, or when repairs would exceed 50% of replacement cost. For Denver homes over 20 years old, replacement often makes more financial sense long-term.

What roofing materials work best in Denver?

Impact-resistant asphalt shingles (Class 4 rated) provide excellent hail protection. For flat roofs common on commercial properties, we recommend modified bitumen or TPO membranes that withstand temperature extremes.

Will you handle permits for my roof replacement?

Yes, we obtain all required permits from Denver or your local municipality and handle final inspections. Permit requirements vary between cities like Aurora and Lakewood, which we navigate for you.

Impressive Reviews From Our Roofing Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"After last spring's hail storm destroyed our 20-year-old roof in Park Hill, Summit Roof Pros guided us through the entire insurance process. They installed a beautiful Class 4 shingle roof that already survived this season's storms with no damage. The crew was meticulous about cleaning up every day."

Mark T. Roof Replacement

"A wind storm tore off several shingles from our Lakewood home's roof. Summit had someone out the next day to tarp the area temporarily, then scheduled permanent repairs within the week. The color match is perfect - you can't tell where the damage was."

Sarah K. Storm Damage Repair

"We wanted a metal roof for our new build in Highlands Ranch but were concerned about noise. Summit Roof Pros explained all the insulation options and installed a standing seam roof that's actually quieter than our old asphalt one during rain storms. Beautiful and functional!"

James and Lisa W. Metal Roofing
